testcase.name: test_promo_reserves_one_crate

failure.message: AssertionError: reserved should increase by 12 bottles (1 crate), got delta=0 (before=0, after=0) assert 0 == 12

testcase.failure: tests/test_promo_bottle_normalization.py:141: in test_promo_reserves_one_crate assert delta == 12, f"reserved should increase by 12 bottles (1 crate), got delta={delta} (before={before_reserved}, after={after_reserved})" E AssertionError: reserved should increase by 12 bottles (1 crate), got delta=0 (before=0, after=0) E assert 0 == 12

testcase.name: test_promo_complete_deducts_bottles

failure.message: AssertionError: complete should deduct 12 bottles, got delta=0 (before=24, after=24) assert 0 == 12

testcase.failure: tests/test_promo_bottle_normalization.py:169: in test_promo_complete_deducts_bottles assert delta == 12, f"complete should deduct 12 bottles, got delta={delta} (before={on_hand_before}, after={on_hand_after})" E AssertionError: complete should deduct 12 bottles, got delta=0 (before=24, after=24) E assert 0 == 12

testcase.name: test_zoho_promo_payload_shape

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = <built-in method endswith of str object at 0xf9b4014c9450>('/deliverychallans') + where <built-in method endswith of str object at 0xf9b4014c9450> = '/books/v3/deliverychallans/ZD-TEST-1/address/shipping'.endswith

testcase.failure: tests/test_promo_dispatch_zoho_sync.py:116: in test_zoho_promo_payload_shape asyncio.run(_runner()) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:190: in run return runner.run(main) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run return self._loop.run_until_complete(task) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_promo_dispatch_zoho_sync.py:99: in _runner assert captured["path"].endswith("/deliverychallans") E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = <built-in method endswith of str object at 0xf9b4014c9450>('/deliverychallans') E + where <built-in method endswith of str object at 0xf9b4014c9450> = '/books/v3/deliverychallans/ZD-TEST-1/address/shipping'.endswith
